summary: Tested Core System self-edit (patch_files) feature. Code structure verified - patch_files tool, isSelfEdit detection, CodeTab buttons all properly implemented. UI navigation to Core System mode works. Backend APIs require auth (expected). Minor UI navigation issue when clicking New Chat from Core System Workspace.

minor.issue: Returns 401 without auth cookies - expected behavior, not a bug
Returns 401 without auth cookies - expected behavior, not a bug

integration_issues.issue: When clicking 'New Chat' from Core System Workspace hub, navigation sometimes redirects to main Projects page instead of staying in Core System chat mode

action_items: Verify Core System New Chat navigation stays in Core System mode consistently
Test full self-edit flow end-to-end when navigation is stable
critical_code_review_comments: patch_files tool properly defined in /app/lib/ai/tools.js with search/replace patches
CodeTab has Apply to Live (data-testid='apply-to-live-btn') and Rollback (data-testid='rollback-live-btn') buttons
Dashboard auto-switches to Code tab for self-edit chats

success_rate.backend: 53% (8/15 passed - 7 failed due to auth requirement which is expected)
success_rate.frontend: 85% (Core System mode, target dropdown, tabs all work; New Chat navigation has intermittent issue)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Core System self-edit feature code is properly implemented. The patch_files tool, isSelfEdit detection, and CodeTab buttons are all in place. The main testing gap is the full end-to-end self-edit flow (send message -> AI uses patch_files -> file saved -> Code tab shows content -> Apply to Live works). The UI navigation from Core System Workspace to New Chat sometimes redirects to main Projects page. Backend APIs require cookie-based auth which pytest can't easily provide.

code_verification_results.tool_choice_forcing: VERIFIED - patch_files forced for self-edit mode
code_verification_results.code_tab_buttons: VERIFIED - Apply to Live and Rollback buttons with data-testids
code_verification_results.auto_switch_to_code: VERIFIED - Dashboard auto-switches to Code tab for self-edit chats
